Responsibility Area: Emergency spending. Treasurer: Helps confirm need, documentation, and after-the-fact review.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Processes only after emergency approval is documented.. Finance Committee: Defines emergency authority and reviews after the fact.. Personnel Committee: No primary role unless staff accountability is involved.. Nominating Committee: No role.. Pastor: May authorize within policy if delay would create harm or prevent urgent ministry need.. Deacons: May authorize or review within policy if assigned.. Congregation: Receives report or votes afterward if required.. Responsibility Area: Business meeting financial report. Treasurer: Presents or helps present report and answer questions.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Prepares supporting packet if assigned.. Finance Committee: Reviews report before presentation.. Personnel Committee: No primary role.. Nominating Committee: No role.. Pastor: Supports communication and framing.. Deacons: Reviews if church practice requires.. Congregation: Receives, discusses, and votes on items requiring action..
